# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch Snapshot Repository Configuration
snapshot_repository:
  s3_repository:
    name: "s3_backup_repository"
    type: "s3"
    settings:
      bucket: "elasticsearch-snapshots-prod"
      region: "us-east-1"
      base_path: "backups/elasticsearch"
      compress: true
      server_side_encryption: true
      storage_class: "standard_ia"
      max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "150mb"
      max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "150mb"
      chunk_size: "100mb"
      readonly: false
      
  file_share_repository:
    name: "nfs_backup_repository"
    type: "fs"
    settings:
      location: "/mnt/elasticsearch/backups"
      compress: true
      max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "100mb"
      max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "100mb"
      chunk_size: "100mb"
      readonly: false

# Snapshot Lifecycle Management (SLM) Policies
slm_policies:
  daily_snapshot:
    name: "daily-snapshots"
    schedule: "0 2 * * *"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    config:
      indices: "*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "slm"
        taken_because: "daily backup"
    retention:
      expire_after: "30d"
      min_count: 7
      max_count: 30

  weekly_snapshot:
    name: "weekly-snapshots"
    schedule: "0 3 * * 0"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    config:
      indices: "*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "slm"
        taken_because: "weekly backup"
    retention:
      expire_after: "90d"
      min_count: 4
      max_count: 12

  monthly_snapshot:
    name: "monthly-snapshots"
    schedule: "0 4 1 * *"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    config:
      indices: "*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "slm"
        taken_because: "monthly backup"
    retention:
      expire_after: "365d"
      min_count: 12
      max_count: 24

  critical_indices_hourly:
    name: "critical-hourly-snapshots"
    schedule: "0 * * * *"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    config:
      indices:
        - "critical-data-*"
        - "transactions-*"
        - "audit-logs-*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: false
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "slm"
        taken_because: "critical data hourly backup"
    retention:
      expire_after: "7d"
      min_count: 24
      max_count: 168

# Manual Snapshot Configuration
manual_snapshots:
  full_cluster_snapshot:
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    snapshot_name: "manual-full-cluster-{now/d}"
    indices: "*"
    ignore_unavailable: false
    include_global_state: true
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: false
    metadata:
      taken_by: "operations_team"
      purpose: "manual_backup"

  selective_indices_snapshot:
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    snapshot_name: "manual-selective-{now/d}"
    indices:
      - "logs-*"
      - "metrics-*"
      - "application-*"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: false

# Restoration Configuration
restoration_configs:
  full_cluster_restore:
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    snapshot: "latest"
    indices: "*"
    ignore_unavailable: false
    include_global_state: true
    include_aliases: true
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: true
    rename_pattern: null
    rename_replacement: null

  selective_restore:
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    snapshot: "latest"
    indices:
      - "logs-2024*"
      - "metrics-2024*"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false
    include_aliases: true
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: true

  point_in_time_restore:
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    snapshot: "snapshot-2024-01-15"
    indices: "*"
    ignore_unavailable: false
    include_global_state: true
    include_aliases: true
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: true

  restore_with_rename:
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    snapshot: "latest"
    indices:
      - "production-logs-*"
    ignore_unavailable: false
    include_global_state: false
    include_aliases: false
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: true
    rename_pattern: "production-(.+)"
    rename_replacement: "restored-production-$1"

  restore_to_different_index:
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    snapshot: "latest"
    indices:
      - "critical-data-2024-01"
    ignore_unavailable: false
    include_global_state: false
    include_aliases: false
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: true
    rename_pattern: "critical-data-(.+)"
    rename_replacement: "recovered-data-$1"
    index_settings:
      number_of_replicas: 1
      refresh_interval: "30s"

# Index Settings for Snapshot Optimization
index_snapshot_settings:
  pre_snapshot:
    refresh_interval: "-1"
    number_of_replicas: 0
    translog:
      durability: "async"
      sync_interval: "30s"

  post_snapshot:
    refresh_interval: "1s"
    number_of_replicas: 1
    translog:
      durability: "request"

# Monitoring and Alerting Configuration
monitoring:
  snapshot_status_check:
    enabled: true
    check_interval: "5m"
    alert_on_failure: true
    alert_channels:
      - "email"
      - "slack"
      - "pagerduty"

  storage_usage_check:
    enabled: true
    check_interval: "1h"
    warning_threshold_percent: 80
    critical_threshold_percent: 90
    alert_channels:
      - "email"
      - "slack"

  snapshot_age_check:
    enabled: true
    check_interval: "6h"
    max_age_hours: 26
    alert_channels:
      - "email"
      - "slack"

# S3 Repository Advanced Settings
s3_advanced_settings:
  client: "default"
  endpoint: "s3.amazonaws.com"
  protocol: "https"
  proxy:
    host: null
    port: null
    username: null
    password: null
  read_timeout: "50s"
  max_retries: 3
  use_throttle_retries: true
  path_style_access: false

# File Share Repository Advanced Settings
file_share_advanced_settings:
  location: "/mnt/elasticsearch/backups"
  compress: true
  max_number_of_snapshots: 100
  readonly: false
  location_mode: "0755"

# Backup Verification Configuration
verification:
  enabled: true
  schedule: "0 5 * * *"
  repository: "s3_backup_repository"
  verify_latest_snapshot: true
  verify_random_snapshot: true
  verification_timeout: "30m"

# Cleanup Configuration
cleanup:
  enabled: true
  schedule: "0 6 * * *"
  repository: "s3_backup_repository"
  remove_orphaned_snapshots: true
  enforce_retention_policy: true

# Security and Access Control
security:
  repository_access:
    allowed_roles:
      - "superuser"
      - "backup_admin"
      - "operations_team"
    read_only_roles:
      - "monitoring"
      - "auditor"

  encryption:
    enabled: true
    type: "AES256"
    kms_key_id: "arn:aws:kms:us-east-1:123456789012:key/abcd1234-5678-90ab-cdef-1234567890ab"

# Disaster Recovery Configuration
disaster_recovery:
  primary_repository: "s3_backup_repository"
  secondary_repository: "nfs_backup_repository"
  cross_region_replication:
    enabled: true
    target_region: "us-west-2"
    target_bucket: "elasticsearch-snapshots-dr"
  
  recovery_time_objective: "4h"
  recovery_point_objective: "1h"

# Notification Configuration
notifications:
  snapshot_success:
    enabled: true
    channels:
      email:
        recipients:
          - "ops-team@company.com"
          - "backup-admin@company.com"
      slack:
        webhook_url: "https://hooks.slack.com/services/xxx/yyy/zzz"
        channel: "#elasticsearch-backups"
      
  snapshot_failure:
    enabled: true
    channels:
      email:
        recipients:
          - "ops-team@company.com"
          - "backup-admin@company.com"
          - "on-call@company.com"
      slack:
        webhook_url: "https://hooks.slack.com/services/xxx/yyy/zzz"
        channel: "#elasticsearch-alerts"
      pagerduty:
        service_key: "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"
        severity: "critical"

  restore_completion:
    enabled: true
    channels:
      email:
        recipients:
          - "ops-team@company.com"
      slack:
        webhook_url: "https://hooks.slack.com/services/xxx/yyy/zzz"
        channel: "#elasticsearch-ops"

# Performance Tuning
performance:
  snapshot:
    concurrent_streams: 5
    max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "150mb"
    max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "150mb"
    chunk_size: "100mb"
    buffer_size: "512kb"

  network:
    socket_timeout: "5m"
    connection_timeout: "1m"
    max_connections_per_route: 10
    max_connections_total: 50

# Metadata and Tagging
metadata:
  environment: "production"
  team: "operations"
  cost_center: "infrastructure"
  compliance: "required"
  retention_policy: "30-90-365"
  backup_tier: "critical"

tags:
  application: "elasticsearch"
  component: "snapshot"
  managed_by: "operations_team"
  backup_type: "automated"
  compliance_level: "high"
